backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing e-commerce backend with product management (add, search, image upload), shopping cart operations, review system, and checkout with payment methods (Cash on Delivery and UPI).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented admin authentication features: login form with password input, protected admin features, and logout functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration files for the GLORY 123 e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode theme variables for a yellow/gold color scheme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GLORY 123 application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (home, product detail, cart, payment, order success, admin) with shared layout containing Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying GLORY 123 branding, contact information (phone: 9892246308, address: R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI), social media links, and Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with GLORY 123 branding, links to Products and Admin pages, and shopping cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Custom hook managing admin authentication state with sessionStorage persistence, providing login, logout, and authentication status checking functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for e-commerce operations including product search, cart management, checkout, and admin functions, all using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom yellow/gold theme variables for light and dark modes, including primary colors, backgrounds, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel with password-protected login form and product management interface for adding products with images, name, category, price, and description.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with product images, quantity controls, and navigation to checkout or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page with success message and navigation buttons to continue shopping or view cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page component with COD and UPI payment method selection, UPI ID copy functionality, and checkout mutation to complete orders.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page displaying product information, image, reviews, and add-to-cart functionality with review submission capability.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListPage.tsx: Product listing page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and grid display of products with placeholder or uploaded images.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended typography, animations, and design system tokens for the UI components.
project_state.json: Project state tracking admin authentication features (login, logout, protected routes) and pending feature requests for payment integration, order tracking, and analytics.
